draft:
Dear Sandra,

Thank you for referring Tom Becker to us. We have received his contact information and will reach out to him this week to discuss his bookkeeping needs.

Best regards,
The Team

INTERNAL NOTE: We will reach out to Tom Becker to discuss bookkeeping cleanup.
draft_rationale: The sender is a referral, so the draft thanks the referrer and confirms outreach to the client. It avoids confirming any client-specific details as per the hard rules.
